role: Forward Deployed Engineer – Applied AI Focus
headerTitle: Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  Applied AI  ·  Client Embed  ·  Agentic Workflow Delivery
subjectText: Forward Deployed Engineer – Applied AI — Titan AI (Remote) · $140K–$160K — Will Austin
intro: Titan AI is building the AI platform for banking and wants engineers who own the build inside client environments. Four external FDE engagements, 14 live AI endpoints, Python-first with TypeScript on the stack. Unconventional path to get here — that’s the description, not the exception.
bullets: Builder-first FDE pattern — four complete external deployments: requirements discovery with non-technical operators, prototype, feedback loop, refine, ship. Roofing contractor outreach pipeline. Home services scheduling automation. Auto repair work order system. OOH advertising marketplace. Every engagement ran fast: sub-two-week MVP cadence, full handoff to clients who ran the systems without technical support. Zero missed scopes.

Agentic workflow ownership in production — 14 live endpoints: agent architectures with tool use, structured JSON output, human-in-the-loop confirm-before-execute, eval-driven iteration, and observability on every request (model ID, prompt version, latency, raw output, correction signals). Custom orchestration built from first principles — strong opinions on when frameworks abstract too much and when they don’t. The configuration, evals, and observability Titan Foundry engagements need are the current production model.

Client-facing technical delivery — embedded with owners, ops leads, and crew managers across four industries. Translated complex AI system behavior to non-technical operators under live operational pressure. Prototype to production to handoff in a single engagement. Former GM running P&L and 40–80 staff across Dallas and Las Vegas properties — earned the ability to hold a room with business leads before learning to code.

Python (core) + TypeScript, agent search patterns — Python for data pipelines (1.4M+ property records, batch AI processing, agent orchestration); TypeScript for full-stack application delivery; PostgreSQL, BullMQ + Redis, REST API orchestration. Prompt and context engineering daily across Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus and GPT-4o. Vector search and RAG patterns used in production document retrieval workflows.
closingLine: The Titan AI FDE model — own the build on the platform, iterate with client operators, capture patterns back into the toolkit — is the exact engagement structure these four deployments were built around. Available immediately. TX-based, remote.
matchNotes: Strong: FDE embed model exact, builder-first ethos direct match, Python+TS, agentic workflow ownership, evals, HITL, custom orchestration, client-facing. Gaps: LangChain/LangGraph specifically named (will builds custom), banking domain, pre-Series A risk. JD explicitly says 'unconventional paths preferred' and 'what you don’t know, pick up in weeks not quarters.'
